name: MALIGNANT MELANOMA
definition: develops from melanocytes derived from neural crest cells, arising in preexisting benign nevi

demographics.Frequency: 1% of all cancers; increasing at 3.9% annually

discriminating_features: hypo- / isointense on T1WI + T2WI + STIR images (most commonly)
hyperintense on T1WI + hypointense on T2WI ← T1-shortening effect of the
